expectations.text: fixed.swift contains no try!, as!, or force-unwrap operators
fixed.swift uses Codable instead of JSONSerialization
expectations.evidence: Codable in code, JSONSerialization only in comments/absent

expectations.text: the -1 sentinel is replaced by an Optional or throwing API
